data.title: Microservices
data.description: Amazon leverages a microservices architecture for scalability and flexibility, enabling independent deployment and development of services.

data.title: Scalable Databases
data.description: Uses a combination of databases to optimize for different use cases, including relational and NoSQL databases.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: Utilizes a CDN to accelerate website content delivery and improve user experience.

data.title: Edge Computing
data.description: Amazon incorporates edge computing to process data closer to the user for improved application performance.

data.title: Redundancy and Backup
data.description: Employs redundancy across multiple availability zones to ensure high availability and data integrity.
